topics.title: Star Schema vs Snowflake Schema: Differences, Use Cases, SQL Examples, and Choosing the Right Data Warehouse Model
topics.description: A complete guide to Star Schema and Snowflake Schema — key differences, SQL examples, performance trade-offs, and when to use each model in your data warehouse design.
